---
title: "fasterslower_context_glmms"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-24"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(glmmTMB)
library(effects)
library(car)
library(DHARMa)
library(performance)
library(effectsize)
library(tidyr)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Load data
# ============================================================
ctx <- read_csv("C:/Users/Marcel/Desktop/Study Project/VR Data/ctx_fasterslower.csv")

ctx <- ctx %>%
  mutate(
    SubjectID = factor(SubjectID),
    Residual  = factor(Residual, levels = c("Faster", "Slower")),
    AmpBin    = factor(AmpBin, levels = sort(unique(AmpBin)))
  )

str(ctx)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Build cell means
# ============================================================
ctx_cell <- ctx %>%
  group_by(SubjectID, AmpBin, Residual) %>%
  summarise(
    n_sacc = n(),
    prev_retinal_image_area_deg2 = mean(prev_retinal_image_area_deg2, na.rm = TRUE),
    next_retinal_image_area_deg2 = mean(next_retinal_image_area_deg2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

str(ctx_cell)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Generic plotting helper
# ============================================================
plot_emmeans_retinal <- function(df_em, yvar, plot_subtitle, y_label, legend_position = "right") {
  ggplot(
    df_em,
    aes(
      x = AmpBin,
      y = .data[[yvar]],
      color = Residual,
      group = Residual,
      fill = Residual
    )
  ) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 2.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.35)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = Residual), size = 5,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.35)) +
    geom_ribbon(
      aes(ymin = lower_plot, ymax = upper_plot),
      alpha = 0.10,
      colour = NA,
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.35)
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(Faster = "springgreen4", Slower = "darkgoldenrod2"),
      labels = c(
        Faster = "Fast",
        Slower = "Slow"
      )
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(Faster = "springgreen4", Slower = "darkgoldenrod2"),
      labels = c(
        Faster = "Fast",
        Slower = "Slow"
      )
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      values = c(Faster = 16, Slower = 17),
      labels = c(
        Faster = "Fast",
        Slower = "Slow"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      subtitle = plot_subtitle,
      color    = "Residual",
      fill     = "Residual",
      shape    = "Residual",
      x        = NULL,
      y        = y_label
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      text = element_text(size = 20),
      legend.position = legend_position,
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 26),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 26),
      axis.text.x = element_text(
        size = 22, face = "bold", angle = 45,
        hjust = 1, vjust = 1
      ),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 24),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# run_retinal_lmm_log
#
# Fits a Gaussian mixed-effects model to log-transformed estimated
# retinal image area at the saccade origin or target:
#   log(outcome) ~ AmpBin * Residual + (1 | SubjectID)
#
# The function:
#   - filters invalid retinal image area values (must be finite and > 0)
#   - log-transforms the dependent variable
#   - fits the mixed model with glmmTMB
#   - evaluates model diagnostics
#   - tests fixed effects using Type II Wald chi-square tests
#   - computes estimated marginal means for each Residual × AmpBin cell
#   - back-transforms those marginal means to the original deg² scale
#     for plotting
#   - computes Fast vs Slow contrasts within each amplitude bin
#   - applies multiplicity correction across bins via cross.adjust
#   - back-transforms contrasts to ratios for interpretation:
#       ratio > 1  = Fast > Slow
#       ratio < 1  = Fast < Slow
#
# Returns a list containing:
#   - fitted model
#   - residual diagnostics
#   - estimated marginal means
#   - plotting data
#   - within-bin contrast tables
#   - plot
# ============================================================
run_retinal_lmm_log <- function(
  dat,
  outcome_var,
  outcome_label,
  level_label,
  y_label = NULL,
  legend_position = "bottom",
  contrast_adjust = "holm"
) {
  if (is.null(y_label)) {
    y_label <- "Retinal image area (deg²)"
  }

  dat_model <- dat %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      is.finite(.data[[outcome_var]]),
      .data[[outcome_var]] > 0
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome_log = log(.data[[outcome_var]])
    )

  form_str <- "outcome_log ~ AmpBin * Residual + (1 | SubjectID)"

  m <- glmmTMB(
    as.formula(form_str),
    data = dat_model,
    family = gaussian(link = "identity"),
    control = glmmTMBControl(
      optimizer = optim,
      optArgs = list(method = "BFGS")
    )
  )

  res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = m, n = 1000, refit = FALSE)
  plot(res)

  cat("\n====================================================\n")
  cat("Gaussian mixed model on log DV\n")
  cat("Outcome:", outcome_var, "\n")
  cat("Level:", level_label, "\n")
  cat("====================================================\n")
  print(summary(m))
  print(Anova(m))
  print(check_model(m))

  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Estimated marginal means for plotting
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  em_plot <- emmeans(m, ~ AmpBin * Residual)
  df_em <- as.data.frame(confint(em_plot, level = 0.83))

  df_em <- df_em %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      emmean_plot = exp(emmean),
      lower_plot  = exp(lower.CL),
      upper_plot  = exp(upper.CL)
    )

  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Fast vs Slow contrasts within each amplitude bin
  # Contrasts are estimated on the log scale because the model is
  # fitted to log-transformed retinal image area.
  #
  # p-values are adjusted across amplitude bins using cross.adjust.
  #
  # After back-transformation:
  #   ratio > 1  => Fast > Slow
  #   ratio < 1  => Fast < Slow
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  em_contr <- emmeans(m, ~ Residual | AmpBin)

  bin_contrasts <- contrast(
    em_contr,
    method = "pairwise"
  )

  bin_contrasts_df <- as.data.frame(
    summary(
      bin_contrasts,
      infer = c(TRUE, TRUE),
      adjust = "none",
      cross.adjust = contrast_adjust
    )
  )

  bin_contrasts_df <- bin_contrasts_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      ratio = exp(estimate),
      lower_ratio = exp(lower.CL),
      upper_ratio = exp(upper.CL),
      direction = dplyr::case_when(
        ratio > 1 ~ "Fast > Slow",
        ratio < 1 ~ "Fast < Slow",
        TRUE ~ "Fast = Slow"
      )
    )

  sig_bin_contrasts_df <- bin_contrasts_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(p.value < 0.05)

  cat("\n=== Fast vs Slow contrasts within AmpBin for", outcome_var, "===\n")
  print(bin_contrasts_df)

  cat("\n=== Significant Fast vs Slow contrasts within AmpBin for", outcome_var, "===\n")
  print(sig_bin_contrasts_df)

  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Plot
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  p <- plot_emmeans_retinal(
    df_em = df_em,
    yvar = "emmean_plot",
    plot_subtitle = paste0(
      "Back-transformed estimated retinal image area at ",
      outcome_label
    ),
    y_label = y_label,
    legend_position = legend_position
  )

  print(p)

  invisible(list(
    model = m,
    residuals = res,
    emmeans_plot = em_plot,
    em_df = df_em,
    emmeans_contrasts = em_contr,
    contrasts = bin_contrasts,
    contrasts_df = bin_contrasts_df,
    significant_contrasts_df = sig_bin_contrasts_df,
    plot = p
  ))
}
```



Run models: next retinal image area
Saccade-level
```{r}
res_next_log_sacc <- run_retinal_lmm_log(
  dat = ctx,
  outcome_var = "next_retinal_image_area_deg2",
  outcome_label = "saccade target",
  level_label = "saccade-level",
  y_label = "Retinal image area (deg²)"
)
```








Run models: previous retinal image area
Saccade-level
```{r}
res_prev_log_sacc <- run_retinal_lmm_log(
  dat = ctx,
  outcome_var = "prev_retinal_image_area_deg2",
  outcome_label = "saccade origin",
  level_label = "saccade-level",
  y_label = "Retinal image area (deg²)"
)
```
```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Save retinal image area model plots
# ---------------------------------------------------------
plot_dir <- "C:/Users/Marcel/Desktop/Study Project/VR Data/Plots"

# Create folder if it does not exist
if (!dir.exists(plot_dir)) {
  dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Collect retinal plots in a named list
retinal_plot_list <- list(
  next_retinal_image_area = res_next_log_sacc$plot,
  prev_retinal_image_area = res_prev_log_sacc$plot
)

# Save each plot
for (plot_name in names(retinal_plot_list)) {
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(plot_dir, paste0(plot_name, ".png")),
    plot     = retinal_plot_list[[plot_name]],
    width    = 12,
    height   = 8,
    dpi      = 300
  )
}
```


Counts
```{r}
prev_counts <- ctx %>%
  mutate(prev_valid = is.finite(prev_retinal_image_area_deg2) & prev_retinal_image_area_deg2 > 0) %>%
  group_by(AmpBin, Residual) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total = n(),
    n_prev_valid = sum(prev_valid, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_prev_valid = 100 * n_prev_valid / n_total,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

next_counts <- ctx %>%
  mutate(next_valid = is.finite(next_retinal_image_area_deg2) & next_retinal_image_area_deg2 > 0) %>%
  group_by(AmpBin, Residual) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total = n(),
    n_next_valid = sum(next_valid, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_next_valid = 100 * n_next_valid / n_total,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(prev_counts, n = Inf)
print(next_counts, n = Inf)


valid_counts_wide <- ctx %>%
  mutate(
    prev_valid = is.finite(prev_retinal_image_area_deg2) & prev_retinal_image_area_deg2 > 0,
    next_valid = is.finite(next_retinal_image_area_deg2) & next_retinal_image_area_deg2 > 0
  ) %>%
  group_by(AmpBin, Residual) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total      = n(),
    n_prev_valid = sum(prev_valid, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_next_valid = sum(next_valid, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Residual,
    values_from = c(n_total, n_prev_valid, n_next_valid)
  )

print(valid_counts_wide, n = Inf)
```
